title: hymenophyllum ciliatum var. boryanum
intro: Hymenophyllum ciliatum var. boryanum, also known as Bory's scale moss, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is native to various regions including New Zealand, and is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and providing relief from skin irritations. In terms of herbal preparations, Hymenophyllum ciliatum var. boryanum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
